assessment.note: Names a missing support mechanism — regular pairing to avoid getting stuck silently — which is a strong clarity and growth deficit signal; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] pairing once or twice a week as a support need.

new_queue.label: Support cadence
new_queue.name: What kind of check-in from me would help you most over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Clarifies the support rhythm that would help him move faster without waiting too long for reassurance.

new_queue.label: Fastest unblock
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Ends by narrowing to the most useful support or change to carry forward from the conversation.
